name: Molag Kena
location: Molag Kena in White-Gold Tower, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat: When you consecutively Light Attack 2 times, you trigger Overkill for 6 seconds, which increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 13-560 but also increases the cost of your abilities by 8%. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds.
